title: Retire secure CoAP long-lived correlations
description: SecureDatagramChannel must retain OSCORE request IDs for Observe notifications and CON response retransmissions, but current DatagramChannel callbacks provide no local Observe-cancellation or ACK lifecycle signal. Integrate aiocoap exchange lifecycle notifications or a bounded safe policy so canceled Observe and acknowledged/expired CON correlations are retired without breaking retransmission.
close_reason: Secure CoAP long-lived correlations now retire deterministically without breaking Observe or CON retransmission.
